title: 16 to 19 subcontracting data: academic year 2023 to 2024
body: "Number of 16 to 19 students in further education institutions, schools and academies who are either fully subcontracted or subcontracted for part of their study programme.  This data was collected under the former Education and Skills Funding Agency (ESFA).  Further information  We publish our subcontracting funding rules for post-16 education and training annually. This guidance sets out compliance and control requirements and advice for all directly funded institutions that use third parties to deliver 16 to 19 provision.  "

taxons.title: Data collection for further education providers
